feed.title: Maine Workers' Compensation Board — Current Rules
feed.subtitle: Single paragraph naming the current effective rule set and linking its PDF, not a list; monitored by full-page fingerprint. Proposed-rulemaking notices are only distributed via the Board's email listserv, which has no web/RSS equivalent.

entry.title: Monitoring started: Maine Workers' Compensation Board — Current Rules
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
